issues.title: Event Loop Leakage in AI Provider Singleton
issues.symptom: RuntimeError: Event loop is closed when calling AI services from Celery workers after API requests.
issues.root_cause: GoogleAIProvider was cached with @lru_cache and held an httpx.AsyncClient bound to the first event loop.
issues.resolution: Removed @lru_cache from build_ai_provider() and made GoogleAIProvider loop-aware to reinitialize client on loop mismatch.
issues.lesson_learned: Do not cache stateful async clients globally in hybrid Sync/Async systems.

issues.title: Duplicate Celery Beat Execution in Docker Cluster
issues.symptom: Periodic tasks (for example cleanup_old_chat_sessions_task) ran multiple times simultaneously.
issues.root_cause: Beat (-B) was enabled on all worker nodes, so each replica ran its own scheduler.
issues.resolution: Updated entrypoint-worker.sh to enable Beat only when HOSTNAME ends with -0.
issues.lesson_learned: Celery Beat must run as a singleton in distributed deployments.

issues.title: Redis Global Initialization at Import Time
issues.root_cause: redis_client = get_redis_client() executed at module import in app/core/redis.py before FastAPI loop existed.
issues.resolution: Removed global redis_client and switched code to get_redis_client() / Depends injection.
issues.lesson_learned: Avoid side-effectful infrastructure initialization at module top-level.

issues.title: Memory Task Logic Mismatch
issues.root_cause: Task signature was outdated and called missing method extract_memories_async.
issues.resolution: Updated task signature to (user_id, user_message, assistant_response) and used extract_memories_from_turn.

issues.title: SQLAlchemy Reserved Attribute Crash During Startup
issues.symptom: api and butler restart loops with InvalidRequestError: Attribute name 'metadata' is reserved.
issues.root_cause: DocumentSection declared ORM attribute metadata, conflicting with Declarative reserved name.
issues.resolution: Renamed ORM attribute to artifact_metadata and kept DB column name via mapped_column(name="metadata").
issues.lesson_learned: Never use reserved SQLAlchemy names as mapped attributes; alias at app layer.

issues.title: API Startup Crash From RateLimiter Construction
issues.symptom: API restart loop with ValueError: redis_client is required for RateLimiter.
issues.root_cause: analytics/memories/tree routes instantiated RateLimiter() at import time without Redis client.
issues.resolution: Replaced module-level RateLimiter() with dependency injection: Depends(get_rate_limiter).
issues.lesson_learned: Do not construct Redis-dependent objects at import time in route modules.

issues.title: Retrieval Package Export Drift (Non-Fatal Startup Warning)
issues.symptom: Startup warning: cannot import name 'retrieve_context' from retrieval_service during pre-warm path.
issues.root_cause: app/services/retrieval/__init__.py still re-exported legacy function names after class-based refactor.
issues.resolution: Updated re-exports to RetrievalService and removed stale function names from __all__.
issues.lesson_learned: Keep package-level re-export modules synchronized after function-to-class refactors.
